127.reason: [In BFS traversal, after dequeuing a vertex 'queue[front-1]', the code should use that vertex to explore its neighbors, but it incorrectly uses the original parameter 'v' instead of the dequeued vertex. This causes BFS to always traverse neighbors of the starting vertex 'v', not the current vertex being processed.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS traversal, after dequeuing a vertex 'queue[front-1]', the code should use that vertex to explore its neighbors, but it incorrectly uses the original parameter 'v' instead of the dequeued vertex. This causes BFS to always traverse neighbors of the starting vertex 'v', not the current vertex being processed.]
